data.title: Becton Dickinson Q1 Earnings: Revenue And EPS Beat, Lowers Outlook, Outlines Intent To Separate Biosciences And Diagnostic Solutions Business
data.description: Becton Dickinson plans to spin off its Biosciences and Diagnostic Solutions unit, targeting a fiscal 2026 completion, while updating FY25 revenue guidance.

data.title: Spotlight on Lam Research: Analyzing the Surge in Options Activity
Linde Q4: Revenue Misses, EPS Tops, Shares Dip on Soft Guidance
data.description: Linde signed its largest ever product supply agreement with a customer, supporting a $10 billion project backlog, the CEO says.

data.title: Entegris Q4 Earnings: Revenue And Profit Beat, Warns of 2025 Uncertainty Beyond AI Growth
data.description: Entegris Inc (NASDAQ: ENTG) reported strong Q4 results, beating analyst estimates for EPS and sales. The company also issued guidance for Q1 2025.

data.title: Yum! Brands Stock Shines After Q4 Earnings Beat, Fueled By Taco Bell and KFC Growth Engines
data.description: Yum! Brands' Q4 earnings beat expectations, driven by strong Taco Bell and KFC growth, with the company targeting 5% unit growth and 7% system sales growth long-term.
